turns.user: clouds stacking up fast and the wind keeps rising
a wave just broke over the deck, we're taking on water and I'm panicking
pumped the water out, seas are calming, I think we're okay now
on solo night watch and I can barely keep my eyes open
took the 20 minute micro rest and feel steadier at the helm
what should I take away from tonight for next time
MAN OVERBOARD, my crewmate just went over the side!
we got them back aboard but they're soaked and shivering hard
they're dry, warm and resting now, heart rate back to normal
